trends.headline: Butter yellow is the new neutral — and the cat-eye mani is its cool-girl shape
trends.body: Butter yellow nails are exploding (search demand up ~1,043%) and creators are pairing the soft pastel with the cat-eye 'velvet' manicure shape that's up 50% year-on-year. Shoot a 'painting butter yellow for the first time' POV or a 'one color, five nail shapes' swatch reel.

metadata.context: Pastel nail color and cat-eye manicure shape dominating summer NailTok

trends.headline: Medicube's PDRN pink peptide serum is the affordable 'salmon DNA' glow everyone's testing
trends.body: PDRN (polynucleotide, the 'salmon DNA' ingredient) is BeautyTok's ingredient of the moment, and Medicube's pink peptide serum is the under-$40 way creators are trying it. Film a '14-day PDRN glow diary' or a 'expensive salmon facial vs. the $30 serum' side-by-side.

metadata.context: Affordable PDRN serum riding the salmon-DNA skincare wave

trends.headline: '90s multi-layered tops are FashionTok's maximalist summer styling hack
trends.body: The Rachel Green move of stacking multiple tops — tank over tee, cropped layer over a longline — is officially back as more-is-more maximalism takes over. Shoot a 'how many tops can I layer and still look good' challenge or a 'one tank, three layered looks' transition.

metadata.context: '90s-inspired top-layering as maximalist summer styling content

trends.headline: Boho is back with an indie-chic grunge twist for summer
trends.body: FashionTok's next aesthetic swing is bohemia reworked — beaded necklaces, lace, and floaty layers with a grungier, indie-cool edge instead of the clean coastal look. Make a 'styling boho without looking like 2014' guide or a 'thrift-flip to indie boho' haul.

metadata.context: Bohemian revival with an indie-grunge edge replacing clean-girl styling

trends.headline: Crispy chicken shawarma is FoodTok's most-saved at-home recipe right now
trends.body: Creators are recreating the crackly, street-cart crispy chicken shawarma at home and the satisfying shave-and-stack shots are racking up saves. Shoot the full marinate-to-wrap build with an ASMR shawarma 'shave' or a 'cart vs. my kitchen' taste test.

metadata.context: Viral homemade crispy chicken shawarma recipe with ASMR appeal

trends.headline: Frozen yogurt fruit clusters are the no-bake high-protein summer snack
trends.body: Frozen 'clusters' — yogurt-coated berries frozen into bite-size clumps — are FoodTok's easiest healthy-dessert content, hitting the protein and anti-sweet angles at once. Film a 3-ingredient build with the satisfying frozen 'crack' bite, or a 'TikTok froyo clusters: worth it?' verdict.

metadata.context: No-bake frozen yogurt fruit clusters as a healthy snack format

trends.headline: The 120-second plank is FitTok's accessible 'can you hold it' challenge
trends.body: The 120-second plank challenge is taking over FitTok as a simple, equipment-free benchmark anyone can attempt on camera. Shoot a live-timer 'can I hold a 2-minute plank' attempt, a 30-day plank progression, or a duet-bait 'beat my time' callout.

metadata.context: Time-based plank challenge as accessible, duet-friendly fitness content

trends.headline: 'Grandma-core' collected interiors are beating beige on HomeTok
trends.body: The cookie-cutter beige home is out — creators are layering plate walls, mixed metals and woods, tapestries and inherited pieces into warm, 'collected' rooms with soul. Shoot a 'beige rental to grandma-core' makeover or a 'thrifting for plate-wall pieces' haul-and-hang.

metadata.context: Maximalist 'collected' interiors replacing minimalist beige homes

trends.headline: The Theragun Mini 2 is the wellness gadget creators keep restocking
trends.body: The pocket-size Theragun Mini 2 is one of the rare 'TikTok made me buy it' gadgets reviewers say lives up to the hype, especially for fitness and wellness creators. Film a 'gym-bag essentials' demo, a post-workout recovery routine, or a 'does the mini actually hit deep enough' test.

metadata.context: Compact percussion massager popular with fitness and wellness creators

trends.headline: The Yoto Player is ParentTok's screen-free audio buy of the moment
trends.body: Riding the anti-screen-time wave, the Yoto Player lets kids load $5–$25 story and music cards for screen-free listening — and parents are demoing it everywhere. Shoot a 'screen-free morning routine' with the card swap, or a 'Yoto vs. Toniebox: which we kept' comparison.

metadata.context: Screen-free audio player trending in the anti-screen-time parenting movement

trends.headline: The 90%-less-shedding deshedding brush is PetTok's grooming bestseller
trends.body: A double-sided deshedding brush that creators say cuts shedding by ~90% is the runaway pet-grooming buy, and the fur-pile reveal shots do the selling. Film a 'how much fur came off one golden retriever' brush-out or a satisfying before/after coat reveal.

metadata.context: Double-sided deshedding brush with satisfying fur-pile reveal content

trends.headline: Hyper-local 'one stall the locals line up for' is TravelTok's winning format
trends.body: Broad city guides are out — TravelTok now rewards hyper-specific street-food finds like 'the one dumpling stall locals queue for' over generic top-10s. Shoot a single-vendor deep dive with the order, the price, and the walk-up directions baked into the caption.

metadata.context: Hyper-local single-vendor street-food content outperforming broad city guides

trends.headline: Maximalist charm necklaces are replacing the simple pendant on JewelryTok
trends.body: Charm-based jewelry is one of the biggest JewelryTok trends — piling mismatched charms onto a necklace as 'storytelling' styling that buries the minimalist pendant. Shoot a 'build your charm necklace with me' or a 'each charm means something' personal-story reel.

metadata.context: Maximalist charm necklaces as storytelling jewelry replacing minimal pendants
